# Widget & Co — AI Widget Builder

> Build embeddable AI widgets for your business website in minutes. No coding required.

## Pages

- Home: /
- About: /about
- Pricing: /pricing
- Blog: /blog
- Contact: /contact
- Privacy: /privacy
- Builder (sign-in required): /builder
- Admin (owner only): /admin

## What is this?

Widget & Co is a no-code AI widget builder for small businesses. Create chatbots, product quizzes, lead qualifiers, FAQ search widgets, and review summarizers. Configure, test, and embed with one script tag.

## Product types

1. **Chatbot** — Answers visitor questions about your business.
2. **Product Quiz** — Recommends products after 2–3 questions.
3. **Lead Qualifier** — Scores hot and cold leads in conversation.
4. **FAQ Search** — Matches questions to FAQs with friendly AI answers.
5. **Review Summarizer** — Static card showing review sentiment and themes.

## Blog topics

- Why small businesses need AI chatbots
- How to embed AI widgets on WordPress
- Lead qualifier vs contact forms

## Key facts

- Free to use
- Google sign-in for business owners
- Groq AI (Llama 3.3 70B) powers responses
- Visitor messages are anonymous
- API keys never exposed to browsers
